## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Tango and GrowthX for reinvigorating Tango's self-serve engine through content marketing strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tango seeks to revitalize its self-serve engine, focusing on content marketing and influencer strategies](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an AI-powered content creation service with expert oversight, aiming to boost organic traffic and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Initial engagement involves an 8-week strategy sprint ($30k), followed by ongoing execution starting at $15k/month](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach combines AI workflows, human expertise, and comprehensive content strategy to replace multiple roles and tools](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)

## Topics

### Tango's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Tango has evolved through several product phases: documentation capture, team collaboration, and now UI automation](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Recent focus on sales-led growth for automation product has flattened self-serve growth](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Aim to reinvigorate self-serve engine, exploring new channels and tools for hybrid go-to-market approach](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Current ICP: Sales teams, expanding to operations teams in software without robust APIs (e.g., ERPs, internal tools)](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, leveraging experience from successful content engines at IBM, HP, and other tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Combines AI-powered workflows with human expertise to create high-quality, targeted content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Platform features:](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [Artifact creation for brand guidelines and context](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Knowledge base for deep research and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [AI coding agent for flexible, code-based workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [Parallelized research and fact-checking processes](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Engagement model:](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
      - [8-week strategy sprint ($30k) for initial setup and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [Ongoing growth execution starting at $15k/month](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
      - [Replaces multiple roles: head of content, writers, SEO agency, graphic designer, and various tools](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

### Content Creation and Distribution Process

  - [GrowthX handles end-to-end content creation, from research to publishing](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Content primarily published on client's website to build authority](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Weekly 30-minute calibration meetings and ongoing Slack communication for feedback and adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Potential for expansion into third-party channels and newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

### Results and Case Studies

  - [Augment Code example: 3x traffic increase, 10x visibility score improvement in \~4 months with 120+ content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Improved search rankings and citations in AI-generated answers for relevant queries](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send follow-up meeting invite for Friday at 10:30 AM with Ken's co-founder Dan](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Ken to relay meeting information to Dan for preparation](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Future discussion to focus on Tango's specific use case and operational details for potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/y-xMT_cjhZ6VEtVsZs35bj4qx3XJwUqJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
